articles.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
articles.description: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

articles.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran
articles.description: The deal under discussion would involve a 60-day ceasefire extension during which the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened, according to US media.
